project_type: C++17 AI Operating System - single-binary REPL application
build_system: clang++ direct compilation (Makefile uses separate .o compilation but entry point supports single-file compilation via #include .cpp pattern)
test_framework: No formal test framework - verification via syntax check and compilation
verification_instructions: 1. Run clang++ -std=c++17 -fsyntax-only -Wall system/mk_entry.cpp from MK_OS/ directory. 2. Verify zero errors. 3. Optionally run full compile: clang++ -std=c++17 -O2 system/mk_entry.cpp -o mk_os -lcurl
setup_instructions: No setup needed. clang++ 15 and libcurl headers are pre-installed on this system.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no package installs. clang++ 15 and curl.h are pre-installed. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: Keep the #include .cpp pattern (no .h header files). Do not create new directories. Do not modify any module files other than system/mk_entry.cpp.
key_patterns: All .cpp files use #ifndef guards for safe multiple inclusion. Modules include each other using relative paths like #include "../network/search_engine.cpp". MKKnowledgeIntegrator transitively includes search_engine, fact_verifier, freshness_manager, cited_response, honesty_engine. deep_reasoner.cpp transitively includes pattern_graph.cpp. search_engine.cpp and realtime_apis.cpp both include http.cpp. MKComposerMode enum replaces MKPersonality in composer.cpp. response_style.cpp uses PersonalityMode enum (no conflict since it is enum class).
directory_structure: MK_OS/ is the project root. Directories: ai_core/ (core AI modules), ai_core/hre/ (Hybrid Reasoning Engine modules + knowledge_files/), network/ (http, search, realtime APIs), system/ (entry point, diagnostics), mk_brain/personality/ (response style), knowledge/ (data files), tools/ (standalone CLI tools).
